mapper.select: select * from shop_cart where product_id = #{longProductId} and member_account_id = #{longMemberAccountId}
mapper.insert: insert into shop_cart(id, product_id, member_account_id, num, created_time, updated_time) values (#{longId}, #{longProductId}, #{longMemberAccountId}, #{intNum}, #{longCreatedTime}, #{longUpdatedTime})
mapper.delete: delete from shop_cart where product_id = #{longProductId} and member_account_id = #{longMemberAccountId}
